steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The statement gives Chile's 1995 production (2.49 million metric tons) and asks for a completion using Chile's 2020 production from the table. The task is simply to read the correct cell: Chile's row, 2020 column.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — "5.73 million metric tons of copper in 2020.": This is Chile's actual 2020 figure from the table. It correctly completes the comparison and uses data about Chile. ✓
  • Choice B — "0.55 million metric tons of copper in 2020.": This is the 2020 value for a different country in the table, not Chile. ✗
  • Choice C — "1.20 million metric tons of copper in 2020.": This is the 2020 value for a different country, not Chile. ✗
  • Choice D — "0.51 million metric tons of copper in 2020.": This is the 2020 value for yet another different country, not Chile. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
